title: gale hartwegii
intro_study: According to "International journal of clinical pharmacology research", gale hartwegii (also referred to as ginseng in the study) may have beneficial effects on health-related quality of life in menopausal women, specifically improving depression, well-being, and health subscales.
side_effects: Gale hartwegii can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems. Some examples of side effects include dizziness, nausea, and vomiting, particularly if the plant is ingested in large quantities. Prolonged use of gale hartwegii can also lead to headaches, fatigue, and skin irritation in sensitive individuals. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can result in anaphylaxis or other life-threatening reactions.
